title: Review Record Schema
description: Append-only log entry for human review of a classifier sample. Each review action creates one new record; does not overwrite raw judge outputs.

sample_id.description: Unique identifier of the sample being reviewed (e.g., '85160_3')

reviewer_id.description: ID or name of the human reviewer (e.g., 'reviewer_001', 'alice@example.com')

timestamp_utc.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when review was completed

action_type.description: Type of action: 'corrected' (changed labels), 'approved' (agreed with judge), 'disputed' (marked for further review)

notes.description: Optional reviewer notes (e.g., 'Image quality too low', 'Instruction ambiguous')

source.description: Optional: where the review came from (e.g., 'hf-space-v1', 'gradio-app')
